justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for an appointment "tomorrow around 9am" and proposed a slot for June 2nd from 09:00 to 10:00 CEST.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly confirming the appointment details and offering further assistance.
